title: Feathery
description: Client-side performance modpack with extra features like voice-chat
body:
# **Feathery**

A **lightweight** and **optimized** modpack designed for smooth gameplay while adding **new features**.

## Features

- 🎤 **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)**  
  Talk to nearby players with proximity voice chat.

- 🎮 **[Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)**  
  Play Minecraft with a controller instead of using a keyboard and mouse.

- 🔍 **[Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)**  
  Get a closer look at far-away builds, mobs, or players with a keybind.

- 🔊 **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)**  
  Realistic sound propagation that bounces and dampens with walls and materials.

- 🚀 **High FPS & Smooth Gameplay**  
  Includes performance-focused mods like:
  - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) – FPS boost
  - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) – physics optimizations
  - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) – memory optimizations

- 🎮 **Quality-of-Life Enhancements**
  - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - configure mods
  - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
  - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - shader support
  - And many more

📜 Built on the **Fabric loader**
